title: Stroke signs
required_observations: last known well time if known
red_flags: sudden severe headache with neurologic signs
escalation_criteria: Any sudden FAST-type sign or neurologic deficit requires emergency escalation.
Record last-known-well time if known, but do not delay escalation to obtain it.
local_actions: Document observed face, arm, and speech findings plus last-known-well time if known.
Escalate through the local emergency pathway.
forbidden_actions: Do not diagnose stroke or stroke subtype.
Do not provide medication, dosing, food, drink, or procedure instructions unless a local clinician or protocol explicitly provides them.
safety_boundary: Prototype protocol navigation card for trained-responder review only. It is not a clinical guideline and cannot diagnose, prescribe, dose, triage autonomously, or override local protocol.
source_note: Prototype protocol card derived from public guideline concepts. Not a clinical guideline.
